Session rename — the sticky latch fix

why /rename got clobbered, measured across 1000 sessions, and the one-flag fix

Root cause, corrected. The Jul-17 design modeled three title writers. There are four: the fourth is Claude Code's native AI auto-titler (ai-title), which only fires on unnamed sessions. ork's banner hook kept un-naming the session by overwriting your /rename, which re-woke that auto-titler.

The four title writers

user/rename — once, arbitrary text. Should win and pin the name.
orkbanner hook — every prompt, <topic> · <branch>.
cmuxstamps the git branch on pane focus.
aiCC's ai-title — auto-summary, only for unnamed sessions.

Event timeline — what the prompt bar ends up showing

Final title

Measured (7-day corpus, 1000 sessions)

25
sessions with a manual rename
7
had the rename clobbered (28%)
502
clobbers by ai-title
3 / 1
clobbers by ork / cmux
